verses.text: Kumpi Artakzaksis' uk hun sungin Babylon panin kei tawh hong ciahto khawm a behbehin a kiciamteh beh lutangte hih bang ahi hi
Gershom: Finehas-te beh pan ahi hi. Daniel: Ithamar-te beh pan ahi hi. Hattush: David-te beh panin Shekaniah' tapa ahi hi
Zekhariah: Parosh-te beh sung pan hi a, amah tawh pasal za khat leh sawmnga kiciamteh hi
Eliehoenai: Pahathmoab-te beh panin Zerahiah' tapa hi a, pasal za nih tawh ahi hi
Shekaniah: Zattu-te beh panin Jahaziel' tapa hi a, pasal za thum tawh ahi hi
Ebed: Adin-te beh panin Jonathan' tapa hi a, pasal sawmnga tawh ahi hi
Isaiah: Elam-te beh panin Athaliah' tapa hi a, pasal sawmsagih tawh ahi hi
Zebadiah: Shefatiah-te beh panin Mikhael' tapa hi a, pasal sawmgiat tawh ahi hi
Obadiah: Joab-te beh panin Jehiel' tapa hi a, pasal za nih leh sawmlegiat tawh ahi hi
Shelomith: Bani-te beh panin Josifiah' tapa hi a, pasal za leh sawmguk tawh ahi hi
Zekhariah: Bebai-te beh panin Bebai' tapa hi a, pasal sawmnihlegiat tawh ahi hi
Johanan: Azgad-te beh panin Hakkatan' tapa hi a, pasal za leh sawm khat tawh ahi hi
Elifelet, Jeiel, leh Shemaiah: A hong nungpai Adonikam-te beh zong hi uh a, pasal sawmguk tawh ahi uh hi
Uthai leh Zabbud: Bigvai-te beh pan hi uh a, pasal sawmsagih tawh ahi uh hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Ezra in Biakinn-a sem ding Levi Mite Zong

verses.text: Ahava gam lamah a luang lui gei khatah amaute ka khawm a, tua lai-ah ni thum sung ka tam uh hi. Mite leh siampite ka etphat ciangin Levi mite khat zong na omlo hi
Tua ahih ciangin a lawmte lakah a makai, Eliezer, Ariel, Shemaiah, Elnathan, Jarib, Elnathan, Nathan, Zekhariah, leh Meshullam-te, leh thu ngaihsut siam Joiarib leh Elnathan-te ka sam a
Kasifia muna a makaipa Iddo kiangah va pai-in, tua lai-a biakinn nasem amah leh a behte in, eite' Pasian' biakinn-a na a sem ding mihing hong puak ding uh a ngen dingin ka sawl hi
Tua hi a, hehpihna a nei eite' Pasian in hong ompih ahih manin Levi mi Mahli-te beh sung panin thu ngaihsutsiam mi ahi Sherebiah, a tapate leh a behte tawh pasal sawmlegiat
leh Merari-te beh panin Isaiah, a behte leh amau' tapate mi sawmlenih leh Hashabiah tawh
Levi mite' na a sem dingin David leh a uliante in a tuamkoih ahi biakinn nasem za nih leh sawmnih hong pia hi. Hih mite khempeuh amau' min ciat tawh a kisam ahi hi.

Tua ciangin eite' Pasian' mai-ah kote kiniamkhiat thei-in, kote leh ka naupangte uh leh ka neihsa khempeuh uh nuamtakin ka khualzinna uhah ka pai theihna ding uh Pasian' tung pan ka nget theihna dingun Ahava lui-ah an tan'na ding thu ka taangko hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh kumpipa kiangah, “Ka Pasian un amah a zong mite khempeuh ompihin amau-a' dingin a hoih na sem a, amah a nusiate khempeuh tungah amah heh hi,” ci-in gen khin ka hih manun lampi-ah kote hong kha dingin galkapte leh sakol tung tuangte kumpipa kiangah ka nget ding ka mai a zum hi
Tua hi a, kote in an ka tang uh hi. Nuamtakin khual ka zin theihna ding uh i Pasian' tungah ka ngen uh a, amah in ka thungetna uh hong pia hi.
Tua ciangin siampi liante sung panin mi sawmlenih — Sherebiah, Hashabiah, leh amau' behte mi sawm ka tuamkoih hi
Tua ciangin i Pasian' biakinn nasepna dingin kumpipa leh a thu lamlakte leh a uliante leh tua lai-a a om Israel mi khempeuh in a tuam khen ciat uh ngun leh kham leh umlebeelte, amaute tungah ka ap hi
Amaute tungah ka apte: Ngun talen za guk sawmnga, talen nih a gik ngun tawh a kibawl umlebeel za khat, kham talen za khat
kham darik tul khat man tawh a kibawl kuang-uk sawmnih, leh kham zahin a manpha sumsan hoih tawh a kibawl beel nih ahi hi
Tua ciangin amaute kiangah, “ Topa tungah note hong ki-ap hi. Umlebeelte zong biakna vante ahi hi. Ngun leh khamte ahih leh na pu na pate uh Pasian ahi Topa tungah citna tawh a kipia na ahi hi
Siampi liante, Levi mite, leh Israel mi beh lutangte' muhin Jerusalem khua-ah Topa' biakinn dei sungah na puak dong mateng uh vilin kem un,” ka ci hi
Tua ahih manin siampite leh Levi mite in Jerusalem-a i Pasian' biakinn-ah puak dingin ngun, kham, leh umlebeelte a hong sang uh hi.

Tua ciangin Jerusalem a zuan dingin kha masa a ni sawmlenih ni-in Ahava lui panin ka dingkhia uh hi. I Pasian in kote hong ompih ahih manin lamkalah galte leh pan'simna a tuamtuamte tawh hong kipelhsak hi
Jerusalem khua ka tun' uh ciangin ni thum sung ka tawlnga uh hi

A ni li ni-in Uriah' tapa siampi Meremoth' tavuan lakna tawh i Pasian' biakinn sungah ngun, kham, leh umlebeelte kiseng hi. Finehas' tapa Eleazar in amah huh a, Levi mi Jeshua' tapa Jozabad leh Binnui' tapa Noadiah in amaute gel huh uh hi
Vante a ki-ap ciangin limtakin kivel a, a ki-ap na khempeuh ciamtehna lai khat kibawl hi

Tua ciangin salsuahna panin inn hong zuankik mite in Israel-te khempeuh-a' dingin Israel Pasian tungah meihal biakna-in bawngtal sawmlenih, tuutal sawmkualeguk, tuuno sawmsagihlenih, leh mawhna hanga biakna-in keeltal sawmlenih a pia uh hi. Hihte khempeuh pen Topa' tungah meihal biakna ahi hi

Amaute in Eufratis Gungal gamsung tenga kumpipa' nuai-ah a uksawn a lian pente leh uliante tungah kumpipa' thupiaknate zong a va gen uh hi. Tua hi a, amaute in mite leh Pasian' biakinn lam nasep a huh uh hi.
